newsletters.subject: The Compute-to-Cash Race: Who Has the Better IPO Story, Anthropic or OpenAI?
newsletters.reasoning: Financial/business analysis of Anthropic vs OpenAI IPO trajectories. Contains significant factual content about ARR ($44B Anthropic), compute commitments ($200B Google Cloud, 300MW SpaceX), monetization efficiency ($211/user vs $25/user), and revenue projections. Relevant for [[Anthropic]], [[OpenAI]] entity pages and AI economics/commercialization concept pages. Links appear to be beehiiv tracking URLs that redirect to actual articles (Forbes, Bloomberg, Reuters, WSJ coverage).
wiki_actions: Update [[anthropic]] entity page with latest financial data (ARR $44B, compute deals with Google Cloud and SpaceX)

Consider new comparison page: [[anthropic-vs-openai-ipo-comparison]] if enough source material emerges

newsletters.subject: Latest open artifacts (#21): Open model bonanza! Gemma 4, DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo 2.5, GLM-5.1 & others. On CAISI's V4 assessment.
newsletters.reasoning: Extremely high-value content from Interconnects.ai (Florian Brand + Nathan Lambert). Covers major open model releases: Gemma 4 (Google), DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6 (Moonshot), MiMo 2.5 (Xiaomi), GLM-5.1 (Zhipu). Includes CAISI evaluation of DeepSeek V4 Pro, benchmark comparisons, real-world coding tests, and discussion of open vs closed model gap. Directly relevant to wiki's core LLM/AI Agent knowledge base. Covers 6+ major model releases in a single digest. Includes practical insights on local inference (llama.cpp, Ollama issues, GGUF quantization), agentic capabilities, and reasoning model architectures.
